findings.note: DO-NOT-EDIT generated file (learn-loop chassis); needs generator-template fix. Target Short: 'List recorded query-to-resource learnings, filterable by query, source, resource, action, and confidence'. Command already carries mcp:read-only and three worked examples.

findings.evidence: Compound workflows that combine multiple API operations
findings.note: workflow is not a spec endpoint: it is the Cobra parent grouper for generated channel workflows (channel_workflow.go, DO-NOT-EDIT), so its manifest text mirrors the Cobra Short and no working override path exists for this 4.28.0-generated CLI. Runtime agents see the Cobra tree via the cobratree walker, so a manifest-only edit would game the audit without changing what agents read.
findings.spec_source_material: spec.yaml has no workflow operation at all; its only resources are publications.search, categories.list, categories.browse (all GET, auth none). The workflow manifest entry is derived from channel_workflow.go's Cobra Short 'Compound workflows that combine multiple API operations'. A rich override already exists in mcp-descriptions.json under key 'workflow' ('Router for the generated data workflows; calling it bare only lists them. Use workflow_archive to sync the central substack.com discovery resources (categories) into the local SQLite store, and workflow_status to see per-resource row counts and last-sync state. To mirror a publication's posts into the searchable corpus, use the archive tool instead.').
findings.target_description: Router for the generated data workflows; calling it bare only lists them. Use workflow_archive to sync the central substack.com discovery resources (categories) into the local SQLite store, and workflow_status to see per-resource row counts and last-sync state. To mirror a publication's posts into the searchable corpus, use the archive tool instead.
findings.gap_analysis: The sanctioned fix path (mcp-descriptions.json + mcp-sync) is mechanically unavailable for this CLI: both v4.28.0 (the generating version) and v4.29.0 reject the 'workflow' key because override validation only accepts spec-tool names, and running either version's mcp-sync migrates the surface destructively (strips the 14-entry manifest to 3 typed tools, drops learn-surface pinning from cmd/substack-reader-pp-mcp/main.go, and under 4.29 emits tools.go calling PutQueryWithParams*/PatchQueryWithParams* that this CLI's client chassis lacks). Verified by two sync attempts, both fully reverted. Fix belongs to the press: either extend override keys to Cobra-walked tools or fix the Short in the channel_workflow generator template, then reprint. Retro candidate filed in the polish summary.
